ValidationRule.description: Cannot edit SAP Customer Number unless you have a specific profile.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, OR(ISCHANGED(PKI_SAP_Customer_Number__c), ISCHANGED(PKI_SAP_Function__c)), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Application Integration profiles'))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_PARTNER_SITE_001: You cannot edit fields unless you have a specific profile
